expected_issues.description: The component is exported as a single SankeyChart component but all Blade chart components follow a Wrapper+Child composition pattern: ChartAreaWrapper+ChartArea, ChartBarWrapper+ChartBar, ChartDonutWrapper+ChartDonut etc. SankeyChart should be ChartSankeyWrapper+ChartSankey to be consistent.

Data is passed as top-level props levels (a columnar SankeyLevel array) and links directly on the component, but all other Blade chart inner components accept a flat data array. The correct shape is data: { nodes: SankeyDataNode[], links: SankeyDataLink[] } passed to the inner ChartSankey component.

SankeyFlowLink uses from and to to reference source and target nodes, but the standard in graph/Sankey data models (and Recharts' Sankey) is source and target. The link type should use source and target.

nodeColorOverride and linkColorOverride are typed as plain string, but Blade uses design token types for all color props — specifically ChartsCategoricalColorToken. Using raw strings bypasses the token system.

All other Blade chart wrapper components expose a colorTheme prop (colorTheme?: ColorTheme) to let consumers switch between categorical, sequential, etc. color palettes. SankeyChart hardcodes colorTheme internally and does not expose it.

All Blade chart wrapper components extend BoxProps to allow layout/sizing via the standard Box API (height, width, margin, padding, etc.). SankeyChart exposes a custom height?: number instead, which is inconsistent.
